task_objective: Fix 10 issues identified in the code review
design_decisions: Restricted fuzzy matching to min 5 chars for both input and target.
Added try/except block for state file integer parsing.
Used collections.abc.Mapping to validate adapter output entries.
Implemented environment allowlist and path-aware redaction in service initialization.
Scoped LD_LIBRARY_PATH clearing to Ludusavi subprocess using a new helper.
Refactored _run_blocking to loop.run_in_executor for standard async/thread interaction.
Updated UI to handle dependency_error with error toasts and conditional success toasts.
Resolved TypeScript conflicts by removing global redeclarations and enabling skipLibCheck.
Added game name sanitization to prevent control characters in logs and UI.
Refactored pyludusavi to use pathlib for all path manipulations.
results: All 10 issues and 1 best practice from the code review have been fixed and verified with tests. The Principal Engineer critique passed.
